title: Embedded Blueprint Cache
description: Build-time inventory written by the BlueprintEmbed MSBuild task. Lists every blueprint version embedded as a resource in the consuming assembly, with the metadata the BlueprintSourceGenerator needs to emit IBlueprintEmbeddedSource implementations.

$schema.description: URI of the schema for this cache file.

version.description: Cache file format version. Bumped on breaking changes to the file shape.

blueprints.description: Every blueprint version discovered under one or more <BlueprintFolder> items in the host project.

name.description: Blueprint name (without version). Mirrors blueprint.yaml's blueprintId prefix.

description.description: Optional description copied from blueprint.yaml. Surfaced in catalog listings without a manifest read.

resourceNamespace.description: Dot-separated namespace under which the blueprint's files are embedded, e.g. 'Acme.Service.Blueprints.MyBlueprint-1.0.0'. The catalog appends '.blueprint.yaml' for the manifest and the relative path (slashes-as-dots) for sibling files.

files.description: Relative paths of every file embedded for this blueprint (with forward slashes). Always contains 'blueprint.yaml' and zero or more sibling files like 'seed-data/entities.yaml' or 'migrations/from-1.0.0.yaml'.
